query: Chaumet new High Jewelry collection nature inspired unveil July 2026 LVMH

{"query":"Chaumet new High Jewelry collection nature inspired unveil July 2026 LVMH","model":"mako","response_time_ms":905,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.lvmh.com/en/news-lvmh/chaumet-celebrates-nature-in-a-new-high-jewelry-collection","title":"Chaumet Celebrates Nature in a New High Jewelry Co... - LVMH","content":"Designed as a sensory journey, the collection features 46 High Jewelry creations presented across three chapters, each inspired by a different family of botanical scents and sensations—from the freshness of green leaves to the warmth of spices and aromatic plants.
A symbol of the Maison since the First French Empire, it appears here in twenty-five new brooches, where bees seem to hover around vividly colored gemstones.","date":"1 day ago"},{"url":"https://www.chaumet.com/us_en/event-a-journey-through-nature","title":"Chaumet Unveils A Journey Through Nature | High Jewelry 2026 | Maison Chaumet","content":"An exceptional gala dinner in the presence of international personalities, including Song Hye Kyo, Li Bingbing and Sophie Marceau.
A dialogue between precious gemstones and rare botanical species.
Majestic nature, rich in inspiration.
To celebrate this new collection, the Abbaye des Vaux-de-Cernay, nestled in the heart of the Parisian countryside, is transformed into an unparalleled stage.
On this occasion, Sophie Marceau, Song Hye Kyo, Li Bingbing, Yara El Namlah, Ed Westwick and his wife Amy Jackson, Gulf Kanawut, Natalia Vodianova, Natasha Poly, along with Ko Shibasaki, graced the event, adorned in Chaumet creations."},{"url":"https://www.lvmh.com/en/news-lvmh/chaumet-reveals-jewels-by-nature-high-jewelry-collection-in-marbella","title":"Chaumet reveals Jewels by Nature High Jewelry coll... - LVMH","content":"Chaumet chose the sumptuous villa El Bosque in Marbella to reveal its new High Jewelry collection Jewels by Nature during a gala dinner on June 18.
Transformable necklaces, sets inspired by the plant kingdom and wondrous plays of volume and color dazzled in creations that showcase Chaumet’s incomparable jewelry excellence and savoir-faire, an enchanting alliance of nature’s poetry and the technical virtuosity of the Maison’s ateliers.
With Jewels by Nature, Chaumet celebrates the beauty of nature and reaffirms its creativity and bold innovation in the world of high jewelry."},{"url":"https://somethingaboutrocks.com/chaumet-unveils-new-high-jewellery-collection-inspired-by-nature/","title":"Chaumet unveils new High Jewellery collection inspired by nature - Something About Rocks","content":"Chaumet has unveiled A Journey Through Nature, its brand new, 46 piece, High Jewellery collection.
The collection serves as a tribute to nature itself with references to leaves, petals and even spices throughout the designs.
Chapter two, named Spicy Sweetness, takes the jewellery eastward with deeply evocative creations inspired by the flavours we pick from the ground.
While Saffron Flower sees the French brand celebrate one of the most sought after spices in nature and here are the most colourfully vibrant pieces in the collection, directly turning the plant into jewellery with yellow diamonds."},{"url":"https://www.trendhunter.com/trends/a-journey-through-nature","title":"Nature-Inspired High Jewelry Collections: Chaumet Debuts the Exquisite 'A Journey Through… | Trend Hunter","content":"Chaumet's 'A Journey Through Nature' collection was unveiled in a grand mise-en-scène at the Abbaye des Vaux-de-Cernay, a historic monastery in the Parisian countryside.
Meticulous atelier techniques are becoming a differentiator for nature-inspired design, supporting premium demand for pieces that feel both artisanal and conceptually rich.
High jewelry brands can differentiate through botanical symbolism, rare gemstones, and limited-edition craftsmanship that reinforce exclusivity in a competitive luxury market."},{"url":"https://www.marketscreener.com/news/lvmh-chaumet-celebrates-nature-in-a-new-high-jewelry-collection-ce7f5ed3db8ef724","title":"LVMH : Chaumet Celebrates Nature in a New High Jewelry ...","date":"1 day ago","content":"1 day ago — Chaumet Celebrates Nature in a New High Jewelry Collection Published on 07/16/2026. LVMH +1.47% Stock LVMH. July 16, 2026,"}]}

Imbued with Moorish heritage and Andalusian artistry, the luxurious venue was transformed into a theater as the Maison presented its exquisite creations during a runway show. A host of celebrities and friends of the Maison were on hand, wearing emblematic pieces from the *Jewels by Nature* collection. Transformable necklaces, sets inspired by the plant kingdom and wondrous plays of volume and color dazzled in creations that showcase Chaumet’s incomparable jewelry excellence and savoir-faire, an enchanting alliance of  nature’s poetry and the technical virtuosity of the Maison’s ateliers.
